title: aloe boylei subsp. major
intro: Aloe boylei subsp. major is a lesser-known succulent plant species, often referred to as a variant of the Aloe boylei plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its gel-filled leaves, which contain anti-inflammatory compounds such as aloin and aloe-emodin. The health benefits of Aloe boylei subsp. major include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Aloe boylei subsp. major include topical creams, ointments, and gels, which can be used to treat burns, eczema, and other skin-related issues.
